one_time_description: Large investment in Yinka Dene Economic Development Limited Partnership resulting in accumulated equity of $12,392,318; investment surplus grew from $5,487,411 to $12,924,117 suggesting significant one-time equity pickup
economic_notes: Yinka Dene Economic Development Limited Partnership reported under modified equity method. FN (PTP) Group Limited Partnership - 1,014 units and FN (PTP) General Partner Inc. - 1 share also held. Coastal Gas Link deferred revenue of $20,000 noted.
notes: Audit is qualified due to incomplete property and equipment listing per CICA handbook PS-3150. The qualification affects property/equipment values and equity in property and equipment but not operating surplus. Large investment activity in Yinka Dene Economic Development LP drove significant investment surplus. Deferred revenue includes $20,000 from Coastal Gas Link. Replacement and operating reserves of $171,965 included in liabilities. Restricted cash estimated as housing reserves $171,965 plus forestry deposit $3,752. Current liabilities estimated as accounts payable $346,452 plus deferred revenue $54,246.
